title: OmSaravanaBhava Browser-Local Devotional Practice Planner
limitations: Schedules are planning guidance only and do not create notifications or alarms.
A check-in records only a local date, route reference and timestamp.
Devotional text, selected passages and page-body content are never copied into plan storage.
Completion check-ins do not prove that a work was fully read, recited or spiritually completed.
No streaks, scores, spiritual-outcome claims, analytics, cloud synchronization or user accounts are provided.
